passes.requirement: assert model changes match spotify.Song, spotify.SongLike, spotify.Album, spotify.AlbumLike.
passes.label: no_op_fail

passes.requirement: assert all newly liked songs are in my library via models.changed_records
passes.label: no_op_fail

passes.requirement: assure none of the updated or removed song likes are from outside of song library.
passes.label: no_op_pass

passes.requirement: assure everything in main_user's song library is liked now.
passes.label: no_op_fail

passes.requirement: assert all newly liked albums are in my library via models.changed_records
passes.label: no_op_fail

passes.requirement: assure none of the updated or removed album likes are from outside of album library.
passes.label: no_op_pass

passes.requirement: assure everything in main_user's album library is liked now.
passes.label: no_op_fail
